label: About
title: About Blush Understory Palimpsest
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 18 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around to be expected, by PINKCOURTESYPHONE and The Alfredo Recipe That Sold Over ONE MILLION TIMES!!, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Blush Understory Palimpsest: Compose a single abstract habitat image as a veiled understory palimpsest: broad translucent vertical planes, a pale suspended tapering form slightly left of center, and a denser nest of fine dry filaments building across the right half. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against dark left border strip with inner seam, large partial circular plaque on left, and translucent tapered central veil.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
